sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n52797" key="kalo/ghrus" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κᾰλό-γηρυς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">υος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n52797.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with a fine voice</tr_>, as etym. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κρήγυον</foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> s. h. <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.</abbr> </sense> </entryFree>
